title: Gilded Sherds
description: Potery sherds with a gilded twist!
body:
This mod adds gilded versions of the decorated pottery sherds that are sure to add a luxurious flare to your builds. This mod draws inspiration from the real life practice of gilding and kintsugi. 

You can gild your sherds by crafting a basic sherd with a golden nugget. This process can be undone by smelting the gilded sherd in a furnace which will melt off and destroy the gold. If you want to reclaim the gold instead and are okay with destroying historic artifacts you can use a blast furnace instead which will destroy the sherd and only leave the gold behind.

![Gilded Sherds Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoN558ya/images/660d78fb7f3ebce65e2a2564ede59332f5bc637e.png)
